formulas.name: Radius of nth Orbit
formulas.variables: n = principal quantum number, h = Planck's constant, m = mass of electron, Z = atomic number, e = charge of electron

formulas.name: Energy of Electron in nth Orbit
formulas.variables: n = principal quantum number, Z = atomic number

formulas.name: Ionization Energy
formulas.variables: n = principal quantum number, Z = atomic number

formulas.name: Wavelength of Radiation Emitted
formulas.variables: λ = wavelength, Z = atomic number, R = Rydberg constant, n_f = final energy level, n_i = initial energy level

formulas.name: Rydberg Constant
formulas.variables: m = mass of electron, e = charge of electron, ε_0 = permittivity of free space, h = Planck's constant, c = speed of light

formulas.name: de Broglie Wavelength
formulas.variables: λ = wavelength, h = Planck's constant, p = momentum

formulas.name: Heisenberg Uncertainty Principle
formulas.variables: Δx = uncertainty in position, Δp = uncertainty in momentum, h = Planck's constant

formulas.name: Frequency of Revolution
formulas.variables: f = frequency, Z = atomic number, e = charge of electron, ε_0 = permittivity of free space, h = Planck's constant, n = principal quantum number

formulas.name: Bohr's Radius
formulas.variables: r_0 = Bohr's radius, ε_0 = permittivity of free space, h = Planck's constant, m = mass of electron, e = charge of electron
